narrative:
Newton Township has 2,443 registered voters, with 45.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.8 percentage points.
